name: Kisame | Melancholy Rain
description:
Kisame is dead, or so everyone thinks. After Kisame faked his death to escape from the Leaf Shinobi, he heard news that Itachi had died, and he decided to defect from the Akatsuki and set out on his own path. Now, it's been a little over a year after the Great Shinobi War and Kisame is making a name for himself as a bounty hunter. After recently completing a mission Kisame holed up in the hollow of a tree to try and wait out the rain and to give him time to bandage his wound. But something is amiss, and now he's on alert.

Image Artist Credit:

https://x.com/repa_ema_turkey?t=5h1bPtvupDIEhf-EOOautQ&s=09

Important Story Info:

• Also, since this seems to be an unknown amongst most people, Kisame has gold/yellow eyes. I listed them as gold. Skin is pale blue, and I included his cheek and shoulder gill markings in the physical description.

• Kisame has an alias name that's he's been using since he started his new life. My friend GreyFangd came up with 'Koru', so that's what I'm going with and what is in his Personality. If you want to be helpful to the bot you could add this info to your chat memory.

• Listen closely damn it. For more accurate details from Naruto, you will have to add them to Chat Memory. This bot would be well over 5000+ tokens trying to put in every little piece of the lore and gimmicks in place. I have a few tips below that helps you ask the bot details about itself in an OOC way so you know what's already there and what isn't. Especially because of the lack of Lore Books, and now the (currently temporarily) lowered context, I can't just put it in myself. This is so you can add in the details that you feel are pertinent to whatever story you want. Hopefully I can improve this bot in the future to be better once I have access to broader options.

• It's up to you to decide what when where why how. The first message is just a starter so feel free to go crazy.

Creator Messages:

•This bot is still undergoing alterations and corrections, but despite LLM 's short comings and the lengthy personality he is functioning and usable. Mostly for the people that like the details and aren't afraid to do some alterations and sliding through several messages to find the sweet spot. If you don't have patience, advice, or constructive criticism than move along.

• Intro message is an open chat in 'Published Chats' so you don't have to go through the trouble of opening your own and deleting it if you don't like the bot.

• Any updates or future plans are in my profile and I, usually, update regularly.
creator: Panthora
